name: SKILLS-CUSTOM
description: Kumpulan custom skills untuk Claude Code: landing page designer, project starter, dan codebase auditor

plugins.name: landing-designer
plugins.description: Create high-quality, conversion-focused landing pages with strong design and marketing structure. Use when building or improving marketing landing pages for any product or service.

plugins.name: project-starter
plugins.description: Help build new projects from scratch. Provides structured guidance and scaffolding for starting any type of project (web app, full-stack, backend, AI agent, etc.). Use when starting a new project from zero.

plugins.name: codebase-auditor
plugins.description: Perform comprehensive codebase inspection, architecture review, and systematic bug detection. Use when user wants deep audit, structural analysis, bug hunting, or architecture review of the current project.
